sentences.sentence: It is often more difficult for outsiders and non-sufferers to understand mental rather than physical illness in others.
sentences.translation: 对于局外人和未患病者来说，理解他人的心理疾病往往比理解身体疾病更加困难。

structure.text: It is often more difficult
for outsiders and non-sufferers
to understand mental rather than physical illness in others
mental rather than physical illness
in others

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正的主语是后面的不定式 to understand...。
rather than 构成对比，说明更难理解的是心理疾病，而非身体疾病。

sentences.sentence: While it may be easy for us to sympathise with individuals living with the burden of a physical illness or disability, there is often a stigma attached to being mentally ill, or a belief that such conditions only exist in individuals who lack the strength of character to cope with the real world.
sentences.translation: 尽管我们或许很容易同情那些承受身体疾病或残障之苦的人，但心理疾病往往带有污名，人们也可能认为，这类状况只会出现在缺乏坚强性格、无法应对现实世界的人身上。

structure.text: While it may be easy for us to sympathise with individuals living with the burden of a physical illness or disability
for us to sympathise with individuals
living with the burden of a physical illness or disability
there is often a stigma attached to being mentally ill
attached to being mentally ill
or a belief that such conditions only exist in individuals who lack the strength of character to cope with the real world
that such conditions only exist in individuals
who lack the strength of character to cope with the real world

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，与后面的 there is... 主句形成转折。
living with... 是现在分词短语，修饰 individuals。
that 引导同位内容从句说明 belief 的具体内容，who 则修饰 individuals。

sentences.sentence: The pressures of modern life seem to have resulted in an increase in cases of emotional disharmony and government initiatives in many countries have, of late, focussed on increasing the general public's awareness and sympathy towards sufferers of mental illness and related conditions.
sentences.translation: 现代生活的压力似乎已导致情绪失调病例增加，而许多国家的政府近来已着力提升公众对心理疾病及相关病症患者的认识与同情。

structure.text: The pressures of modern life
seem to have resulted in an increase in cases of emotional disharmony
to have resulted in
and government initiatives in many countries
have, of late, focussed on increasing the general public's awareness and sympathy
of late
increasing the general public's awareness and sympathy towards sufferers of mental illness and related conditions

difficult_points: 句子由 and 连接两个独立主干：生活压力导致病例增加，政府举措则着力提高公众意识。
seem to have resulted 使用完成式不定式，表示结果已经发生。
of late 是插入式时间状语，意为“近来”。

sentences.sentence: Clinical depression, or 'major depressive disorder', a state of extreme sadness or despair, is said to affect up to almost 20% of the population at some point in their lives prior to the age of 40.
sentences.translation: 据称，临床抑郁症（又称“重度抑郁障碍”，即一种极度悲伤或绝望的状态）会在近20%的人口年满40岁之前的某个人生阶段影响他们。

structure.text: Clinical depression
or 'major depressive disorder'
a state of extreme sadness or despair
is said to affect up to almost 20% of the population
to affect up to almost 20% of the population
at some point in their lives
prior to the age of 40

difficult_points: 两个逗号间的 or... 和 a state... 都是对 Clinical depression 的同位解释。
is said to affect 是“据称会影响”的被动报道结构。
up to almost 20% 表示比例最高接近20%，原文搭配略显冗余但需保留。

sentences.sentence: Studies have shown that this disorder is the leading cause of disability in North America; in the UK almost 3 million people are said to be diagnosed with some form of depression at any one time, and experts believe that as many as a further 9 million other cases may go undiagnosed.
sentences.translation: 研究表明，这种疾病是北美致残的首要原因；在英国，据称任何时候都有近300万人被诊断患有某种形式的抑郁症，而专家认为，另外多达900万例可能尚未得到诊断。

structure.text: Studies have shown
that this disorder is the leading cause of disability in North America
in the UK almost 3 million people
are said to be diagnosed with some form of depression at any one time
to be diagnosed with some form of depression
and experts believe
that as many as a further 9 million other cases may go undiagnosed

difficult_points: 分号连接两个紧密相关但语法独立的陈述，后半部分又由 and 连接专家判断。
are said to be diagnosed 是报道被动结构，其中 to be diagnosed 本身也是被动形式。
go undiagnosed 中 go 是系动词，表示“处于未被诊断的状态”。

sentences.sentence: World Health Organisation projections indicate that clinical depression may become the second most significant cause of disability' on a global scale by 2020.
sentences.translation: 世界卫生组织的预测显示，到2020年，临床抑郁症可能会成为全球第二大致残原因。

structure.text: World Health Organisation projections
indicate
that clinical depression may become the second most significant cause of disability' on a global scale by 2020
clinical depression
may become the second most significant cause of disability'
on a global scale

difficult_points: that 引导 indicate 的宾语从句，完整说明预测的内容。
by 2020 表示“不晚于2020年”的时间界限。
disability 后的撇号属于源文异常，不影响其“致残原因”的含义。

sentences.sentence: However, such figures are not unanimously supported, as some experts believe that the diagnostic criteria used to identify the condition are not precise enough, leading to other types of depression being wrongly classified as 'clinical'.
sentences.translation: 然而，这些数据并未获得一致认可，因为一些专家认为，用于识别该病症的诊断标准不够精确，从而导致其他类型的抑郁症被错误地归类为“临床抑郁症”。

structure.text: such figures are not unanimously supported
as some experts believe
that the diagnostic criteria used to identify the condition are not precise enough
used to identify the condition
to identify the condition
leading to other types of depression being wrongly classified as 'clinical'
other types of depression being wrongly classified as 'clinical'

difficult_points: as 在这里引导原因从句，相当于“因为”，不是时间含义。
used to identify... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 diagnostic criteria。
leading to... 表示前述标准不精确所造成的结果，being classified 是动名词的被动形式。

sentences.sentence: Many of us may experience periods of low morale or mood and feelings of dejection, as a natural human response to negative events in our lives such as bereavement, redundancy or breakdown of a relationship.
sentences.translation: 我们许多人都可能经历士气低落、情绪低迷或沮丧的时期，这是人类面对生活中丧亲、失业或关系破裂等负面事件时的自然反应。

structure.text: Many of us
may experience
periods of low morale or mood and feelings of dejection
as a natural human response to negative events in our lives
such as bereavement, redundancy or breakdown of a relationship

difficult_points: as a natural human response... 是补充说明，表明这些情绪是对负面事件的自然反应。
such as 后列举 bereavement、redundancy 和 relationship breakdown 三类事件。

sentences.sentence: Some of us may even experience periods of depression and low levels of motivation which have no tangible reason or trigger.
sentences.translation: 我们当中有些人甚至可能经历一段抑郁、动力低下的时期，却找不到任何明确的原因或诱因。

structure.text: Some of us
may even experience
periods of depression and low levels of motivation
which have no tangible reason or trigger
no tangible reason or trigger

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句，语义上说明前面所述抑郁和动力低下的时期没有明确诱因。
tangible 在这里不是“可触摸的”，而是“明确、可确认的”。

sentences.sentence: Clinical depression is classified as an on-going state of negativity, with no tangible cause, where sufferers enter a spiral of persistent negative thinking, often experiencing irritability, perpetual tiredness and listlessness.
sentences.translation: 临床抑郁症被界定为一种没有明确原因、持续存在的消极状态；在这种状态下，患者会陷入持续负面思维的恶性循环，并常常感到易怒、长期疲惫和无精打采。

structure.text: Clinical depression
is classified as an on-going state of negativity
with no tangible cause
where sufferers enter a spiral of persistent negative thinking
sufferers
enter a spiral of persistent negative thinking
often experiencing irritability, perpetual tiredness and listlessness

difficult_points: where 并非指具体地点，而是把 state of negativity 当作一种“处境”加以说明。
experiencing... 的逻辑主语是 sufferers，补充患者陷入负面思维时伴随的症状。
a spiral of... 表示一种不断加剧、难以摆脱的循环过程。

sentences.sentence: Sufferers of clinical depression are said to be at higher risk of resorting to drug abuse or even suicide attempts than the rest of the population.
sentences.translation: 据称，与其他人群相比，临床抑郁症患者更有可能诉诸药物滥用，甚至尝试自杀。

structure.text: Sufferers of clinical depression
are said to be at higher risk
to be at higher risk of resorting to drug abuse or even suicide attempts
resorting to drug abuse or even suicide attempts
than the rest of the population

difficult_points: are said to be 是报道被动结构，表示这一判断来自一般研究或说法。
than 引出的比较对象是 the rest of the population，对应前面的 higher risk。
resort to 表示在困境中“诉诸”某种通常不理想的做法。

sentences.sentence: Clinical depression is generally diagnosed when an individual is observed to exhibit an excessively depressed mood and/or 'anhedonia' – an inability to experience pleasure from positive experiences such as enjoying a meal or pleasurable social interaction – for a period of two weeks or more, in conjunction with five or more additional recognised symptoms.
sentences.translation: 一般而言，如果观察到一个人持续两周或更久表现出过度低落的情绪和/或“快感缺失”——即无法从享用美食或愉快的社交互动等积极体验中感受到快乐——并同时出现另外五种或更多公认症状，便会被诊断为临床抑郁症。

structure.text: Clinical depression is generally diagnosed
when an individual is observed to exhibit an excessively depressed mood and/or 'anhedonia'
is observed to exhibit
an inability to experience pleasure from positive experiences such as enjoying a meal or pleasurable social interaction
to experience pleasure from positive experiences
such as enjoying a meal or pleasurable social interaction
for a period of two weeks or more
in conjunction with five or more additional recognised symptoms

difficult_points: when 从句给出诊断发生的条件，而不只是说明时间。
两个破折号之间是对 anhedonia 的同位解释，核心含义是无法从积极体验中获得快乐。
is observed to exhibit 是被动结构，表示“被观察到表现出”。
for... 与 in conjunction with... 分别限定症状持续时长和同时满足的附加条件。

sentences.sentence: These additional symptoms may include overwhelming feelings of sadness; inability to sleep, or conversely, excessive sleeping; feelings of guilt, nervousness, abandonment or fear; inability to concentrate; interference with memory capabilities; fixation with death or extreme change in eating habits and associated weight gain or loss.
sentences.translation: 这些附加症状可能包括：强烈的悲伤感；无法入睡，或相反地，睡眠过度；内疚、紧张、被遗弃或恐惧感；无法集中注意力；记忆能力受到干扰；执着于死亡，或者饮食习惯发生极端变化并伴随体重增加或下降。

structure.text: These additional symptoms
may include
overwhelming feelings of sadness
inability to sleep, or conversely, excessive sleeping
feelings of guilt, nervousness, abandonment or fear
inability to concentrate
interference with memory capabilities
fixation with death or extreme change in eating habits and associated weight gain or loss

difficult_points: 分号将 may include 后面的多组并列症状分隔开来，所有项目都作 include 的宾语。
conversely 表示前后症状相反：既可能失眠，也可能睡眠过度。
associated 修饰 weight gain or loss，表示体重变化与饮食习惯的改变相伴。

sentences.sentence: Clinical depression was originally solely attributed to chemical imbalance in the brain, and while anti-depressant drugs which work to optimise levels of 'feel good' chemicals – serotonin and norepinephrine – are still commonly prescribed today, experts now believe that onset of depression may be caused by a number, and often combination of, physiological and socio-psychological factors.
sentences.translation: 临床抑郁症最初完全被归因于大脑中的化学物质失衡；如今，用于优化血清素和去甲肾上腺素这类“使人感觉良好”的化学物质水平的抗抑郁药仍被普遍开具，但专家现在认为，抑郁症的发作可能由多种生理和社会心理因素造成，而且往往是这些因素共同作用的结果。

structure.text: Clinical depression was originally solely attributed to chemical imbalance in the brain
while anti-depressant drugs which work to optimise levels of 'feel good' chemicals – serotonin and norepinephrine – are still commonly prescribed today
which work to optimise levels of 'feel good' chemicals
to optimise levels of 'feel good' chemicals
serotonin and norepinephrine
experts now believe
that onset of depression may be caused by a number, and often combination of, physiological and socio-psychological factors
may be caused by

difficult_points: 句子由 and 连接两层观点：早期归因与当代专家看法；while 从句嵌在第二部分中表示让步。
which 修饰 anti-depressant drugs，说明药物通过优化相关化学物质水平发挥作用。
破折号中的 serotonin and norepinephrine 是对 'feel good' chemicals 的同位举例。
a number, and often combination of 属于源文略不规范的并列，语义是“多种因素，而且往往是多因素组合”。

sentences.sentence: Treatment approaches vary quite dramatically from place to place and are often tailored to an individual's particular situation; however, some variation of a combination of medication and psychotherapy is most commonly used.
sentences.translation: 治疗方法因地区而有很大差异，而且通常会根据个人的具体情况进行调整；不过，最常见的做法仍是以某种方式将药物治疗与心理治疗结合起来。

structure.text: Treatment approaches
vary quite dramatically from place to place
and are often tailored to an individual's particular situation
however
some variation of a combination of medication and psychotherapy
is most commonly used

difficult_points: 前半句的 vary 和 are tailored 共用主语 Treatment approaches。
分号后的 however 是连接副词，引出与“方法差异很大”相对照的普遍做法。
some variation of a combination 表示具体组合形式可能不同，而非单一固定方案。

sentences.sentence: The more controversial electroconvulsive therapy (ECT) may also be used where initial approaches fail.
sentences.translation: 如果初始治疗方法无效，也可能采用更具争议的电休克疗法（ECT）。

structure.text: The more controversial electroconvulsive therapy (ECT)
may also be used
where initial approaches fail
initial approaches
fail

difficult_points: where 在此不是地点关系词，而是引导条件，含义接近“在初始方法失败的情况下”。
may be used 是情态动词加被动语态，表示一种可能采用的治疗选择。

sentences.sentence: In extreme cases, where an individual exhibits behaviour which Indicates that they may cause physical harm to themselves, psychiatric hospitalisation may be necessary as a form of intensive therapy.
sentences.translation: 在极端情况下，如果一个人表现出的行为显示其可能伤害自己的身体，那么住进精神病院可能是必要的，可作为一种强化治疗。

structure.text: In extreme cases
where an individual exhibits behaviour which Indicates that they may cause physical harm to themselves
which Indicates that they may cause physical harm to themselves
that they may cause physical harm to themselves
psychiatric hospitalisation
may be necessary
as a form of intensive therapy

difficult_points: where 从句补充说明 extreme cases 具体指什么情形。
which 修饰 behaviour，而 that 从句则作 Indicates 的宾语，说明行为显示出的风险。
they 和 themselves 均回指不限定性别的 an individual。
Indicates 的大写属于源文异常，应按普通动词 indicates 理解。

sentences.sentence: Some recent studies, such as those published by the Archives of General Psychiatry, hold that around a quarter of diagnosed clinical depression cases should actually be considered as significant but none-the-less ordinary sadness and maladjustment to coping with trials in life, indicating that in such cases, psychotherapy rather than treatment through medication is required.
sentences.translation: 近期的一些研究，例如《普通精神病学档案》发表的研究，认为大约四分之一被诊断为临床抑郁症的病例其实应被视为程度严重但仍属普通的悲伤，以及面对生活磨难时的适应不良；这表明在此类情况下，需要的是心理治疗而非药物治疗。

structure.text: Some recent studies
such as those published by the Archives of General Psychiatry
published by the Archives of General Psychiatry
hold
that around a quarter of diagnosed clinical depression cases should actually be considered as significant but none-the-less ordinary sadness and maladjustment to coping with trials in life
should actually be considered as
indicating that in such cases, psychotherapy rather than treatment through medication is required
that in such cases, psychotherapy rather than treatment through medication is required

difficult_points: hold that 在这里表示“持有……观点”，that 从句包含研究的核心结论。
published by... 是过去分词短语，修饰 those，those 代指 studies。
indicating... 的逻辑内容承接整个前述研究结论，并进一步推出治疗选择。
rather than 连接 psychotherapy 与 medication treatment，强调前者才是所需方案。

sentences.sentence: Recovery as a result of psychotherapy tends, in most cases, to be a slower process than improvements related to medication; however, improvements as a result of psychological treatment, once achieved, have been observed in some individuals to be more long term and sustainable than those attained through prescription drugs.
sentences.translation: 在大多数情况下，通过心理治疗实现康复的过程往往比药物带来的改善更慢；然而，一旦心理治疗取得成效，人们观察到某些患者的改善比处方药带来的改善更持久、更具可持续性。

structure.text: Recovery as a result of psychotherapy
tends, in most cases, to be a slower process than improvements related to medication
in most cases
related to medication
however
improvements as a result of psychological treatment
once achieved
have been observed in some individuals to be more long term and sustainable than those attained through prescription drugs
attained through prescription drugs

difficult_points: 分号前后形成“见效较慢”与“效果更持久”的对比，however 明确标出转折。
once achieved 是省略了 improvements are 的时间从句，意为“一旦取得”。
those 代指 improvements，attained through... 修饰 those，避免重复。
have been observed... to be 是被动观察结构，表示研究中发现这些改善更持久。

sentences.sentence: Various counselling approaches exist, though all focus on enhancing the subject's ability to function on a personal and interpersonal level.
sentences.translation: 咨询方法多种多样，但它们都着重提升接受治疗者在个人及人际层面正常生活与发挥作用的能力。

structure.text: Various counselling approaches
exist
though all focus on enhancing the subject's ability to function on a personal and interpersonal level
enhancing the subject's ability
to function on a personal and interpersonal level

difficult_points: though 引导让步关系：方法虽不同，但关注点一致。
to function... 修饰 ability，说明要增强的是哪方面的能力。
subject 在此指接受研究或治疗的人，而非“学科”。

sentences.sentence: Sessions involve encouragement of an individual to view themselves and their relationships in a more positive manner, with the intention of helping patients to replace negative thoughts with a more positive outlook.
sentences.translation: 治疗过程包括鼓励个人以更积极的方式看待自己及其人际关系，目的是帮助患者用更积极的人生观取代消极想法。

structure.text: Sessions
involve
encouragement of an individual to view themselves and their relationships in a more positive manner
to view themselves and their relationships in a more positive manner
with the intention of helping patients to replace negative thoughts with a more positive outlook
helping patients to replace negative thoughts with a more positive outlook
to replace negative thoughts with a more positive outlook

difficult_points: encouragement 后的 of an individual to view... 表示鼓励某人采取某种看法。
themselves 和 their 均回指不限定性别的 an individual。
with the intention of... 是目的表达，其中 replace A with B 表示用B取代A。

sentences.sentence: It is apparent that susceptibility to depression can run in families.
sentences.translation: 显然，抑郁症的易感性可能具有家族聚集性。

structure.text: It is apparent
that susceptibility to depression can run in families
susceptibility to depression
can run in families

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句才是 is apparent 所评价的真正内容。
run in families 是固定表达，指某种疾病或特征在家族中遗传或聚集。

sentences.sentence: However, it remains unclear as to whether this is truly an inherited genetic trait or whether biological and environmental factors common to family members may be at the root of the problem.
sentences.translation: 然而，目前仍不清楚这究竟是真正遗传而来的基因特征，还是家庭成员共有的生物与环境因素才是问题的根源。

structure.text: it remains unclear
as to whether this is truly an inherited genetic trait or whether biological and environmental factors common to family members may be at the root of the problem
whether this is truly an inherited genetic trait
or whether biological and environmental factors common to family members may be at the root of the problem
common to family members
may be at the root of the problem

difficult_points: as to whether... 引出“不清楚”的具体问题，两个 whether 分句构成二选一。
this 回指上一句所说的抑郁症易感性具有家族聚集性的现象。
common to family members 后置修饰 biological and environmental factors。
be at the root of 表示“是……的根源”。

sentences.sentence: In some cases, sufferers of depression may need to unlearn certain behaviours and attitudes they have established in life and develop new coping strategies designed to help them deal with problems they may encounter, undoing patterns of destructive behaviour they may have observed in their role models and acquired for themselves.
sentences.translation: 在某些情况下，抑郁症患者可能需要摒弃自己在生活中形成的某些行为与态度，并培养新的应对策略，帮助自己处理可能遇到的问题，同时改掉那些从榜样身上观察并自行习得的破坏性行为模式。

structure.text: In some cases
sufferers of depression
may need to unlearn certain behaviours and attitudes they have established in life
they have established in life
and develop new coping strategies designed to help them deal with problems they may encounter
designed to help them deal with problems they may encounter
they may encounter
undoing patterns of destructive behaviour they may have observed in their role models and acquired for themselves
they may have observed in their role models and acquired for themselves

difficult_points: unlearn 和 develop 是由 and 连接的两个动作，共同受 may need to 支配。
they have established...、they may encounter 和 they may have observed... 都省略了作宾语的关系代词。
designed to help... 是过去分词短语，修饰 coping strategies。
undoing... 补充说明培养新策略时要消除旧有模式，其逻辑主语仍是 sufferers。
